introSection: Delphis the Coaster (Japanese: デルピス・ザ・コースター) was a steel roller coaster built by Japanese manufacturer Senyo Kogyo that was previously located at the now defunct Festivalgate in Osaka, Japan.
fullText:
Delphis the Coaster (Japanese: デルピス・ザ・コースター) was a steel roller coaster built by Japanese manufacturer Senyo Kogyo that was previously located at the now defunct Festivalgate in Osaka, Japan.



Aqua track and white supports.
